meta.product_contents: Tapabocas x50 + Gorro Oruga x50 + Guantes Nitrilo x100

prompts.headline: El kit que te hace ver diferente desde el primer guante.
prompts.prompt: IMPORTANT: All text visible in the image must be written exclusively in Spanish — no English words in any headline, label, callout, badge, CTA, or caption. Use the product images as brand reference. Reproduce the exact product colors, typographic style, and brand tone. Create: a static ad with a solid lilac background #A855F7. Top third: large bold sans-serif headline in white Montserrat ExtraBold that reads 'El kit que te hace ver diferente desde el primer guante.' Smaller subheadline below in white: 'Tapabocas + Gorro Oruga + Guantes Nitrilo. $55.000 COP.' Bottom half: flat-lay product photo of Kit Lila Completo — lilac nitrile gloves box, lilac face masks box, lilac hair nets — arranged on a white marble surface with soft studio lighting, shot from slightly above at 50mm f/2.8. PROVI logo bottom right in white. Teal #2CB1BC CTA bar at the bottom: 'Pídelo por WhatsApp ➜'. INVIMA badge bottom left. Clean, authoritative, premium beauty brand aesthetic. Aspect ratio 4:5.
prompts.negative_prompt: blurry text, cluttered layout, low quality, watermark, distorted products, english text

prompts.headline: Kit Lila Completo — $55.000 COP
prompts.prompt: IMPORTANT: All text visible in the image must be written exclusively in Spanish — no English words in any headline, label, callout, badge, CTA, or caption. Use product images as brand reference. Reproduce exact brand colors and typographic style. Create: a promotional ad with a split background. The top 60% is lilac #A855F7 and the bottom 40% is warm cream/white #FAFAFA. The Kit Lila Completo product (lilac gloves box, lilac masks box, lilac hair nets) is centered at the color junction with soft studio lighting. Top zone: large white sans-serif bold text 'Kit Lila Completo'. Below in white: '$55.000 COP'. Smaller white text below: 'Tapabocas x50 · Gorro Oruga x50 · Guantes Nitrilo x100'. Bottom section: dark navy #0F2A43 text listing key values: '✓ Certificado INVIMA ✓ Envíos a toda Colombia ✓ Precio de distribuidor'. Teal #2CB1BC CTA bar: 'Escríbenos al WhatsApp ➜ 312 678 6075'. PROVI logo bottom right. Aspect ratio 4:5.
prompts.negative_prompt: cluttered, misaligned split, cheap looking, blurry, watermark, english text

prompts.headline: "Mis clientas preguntan dónde consigo los guantes lilas"
prompts.prompt: IMPORTANT: All text visible in the image must be written exclusively in Spanish — no English words in any headline, label, callout, badge, CTA, or caption. Use brand images as reference. Create: a testimonial ad set in a bright professional nail salon with warm natural light. Kit Lila products (lilac gloves, lilac masks, lilac hair nets) arranged on a clean salon table, slightly out of focus. Overlaid text: bold white sans-serif large headline '"Mis clientas preguntan dónde consigo los guantes lilas"'. Below in smaller white text: '"Desde que uso el Kit Lila de PROVI, mi imagen cambió por completo. Todo coordinado, todo profesional, y mis clientes lo notan."' Five gold filled stars ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐. Attribution: 'Laura M. — Manicurista profesional, Bogotá'. PROVI logo bottom right in white. Teal #2CB1BC CTA strip: 'Cotiza por WhatsApp ➜'. Shot at 35mm f/2.0. Warm, authentic, professional beauty setting. Aspect ratio 4:5.
prompts.negative_prompt: fake looking, over-produced, stock photo feel, bad lighting, watermark, english text

prompts.headline: ¿Qué hace diferente al Kit Lila?
prompts.prompt: IMPORTANT: All text visible in the image must be written exclusively in Spanish — no English words in any headline, label, callout, badge, CTA, or caption. Use brand images as reference. Create: an educational diagram-style ad on white background. Top: bold lilac #A855F7 text header '¿Qué hace diferente al Kit Lila?' Below: Kit Lila Completo product (lilac gloves, lilac face masks, lilac hair nets) centered, even studio lighting. Four callout boxes with connecting lines pointing to different products: '✓ Certificado INVIMA — uso profesional garantizado', '✓ Color lila coordinado — imagen premium para tu negocio', '✓ 200 unidades en 1 kit — precio de distribuidor', '✓ Guantes nitrilo hipoalergénicos — protección total'. Each callout has a small lilac circle dot. Website text bottom center: 'provi.tienda'. PROVI logo bottom right. Clean, luxury-agency-redesigned scientific diagram aesthetic. Price badge: '$55.000 COP'. Teal #2CB1BC accent colors. Aspect ratio 1:1.
prompts.negative_prompt: cluttered callouts, illegible connectors, cheap layout, watermark, english text

prompts.headline: Todo lo que necesitas para trabajar hoy.

prompts.headline: Kit Lila PROVI vs. Compra Individual
prompts.prompt: IMPORTANT: All text visible in the image must be written exclusively in Spanish — no English words in any headline, label, callout, badge, CTA, or caption. Use brand images as reference. Create: a vertically split comparison image. Left side: muted blue-gray background. Right side: vibrant lilac #A855F7. Top center: white circle with 'VS' text. Left header: 'Compra Individual' in gray + generic mixed-color supplies (blue gloves, white masks, random hair nets) with red X marks and list: '✗ Tapabocas x50: ~$24.000', '✗ Gorros x50: ~$14.500', '✗ Guantes x100: ~$33.000', '✗ Total: $71.500 COP', '✗ Sin garantía INVIMA'. Right header: 'Kit Lila PROVI' in white bold + coordinated lilac kit (gloves, masks, hair nets) with white checkmarks and list: '✓ Color lila coordinado', '✓ Todo en un solo pedido', '✓ Solo $55.000 COP', '✓ Certificado INVIMA', '✓ Asesoría por WhatsApp'. PROVI logo bottom right. Teal CTA bar: 'Haz tu pedido por WhatsApp ➜'. Aspect ratio 4:5.
prompts.negative_prompt: unclear comparison, bad alignment, blurry, watermark, english text

prompts.headline: "El problema: ahora no puedo usar guantes de otro color"
prompts.prompt: IMPORTANT: All text visible in the image must be written exclusively in Spanish — no English words in any headline, label, callout, badge, CTA, or caption. Use brand images as reference. Create: a scroll-stopping reverse-negative review ad. Background: close-up of the Kit Lila products (lilac gloves, lilac masks) slightly out of focus, vibrant purple tones. Center: white rounded-corner review card (Mercado Libre style). Gray user icon, name 'Camila R.' One gold star + four gray stars, orange badge 'Compra Verificada'. Bold text: '"El problema: ahora no puedo usar guantes de otro color"'. Body text in lighter gray: 'Pensé que era exagerado pagar por un kit coordinado. Error mío. La imagen de mi salón cambió completamente. Mis clientes preguntan. No puedo volver a los guantes azules genéricos.' Below the card: bold white sans-serif text 'LAS RESEÑAS YA LO DICEN 🩷'. PROVI logo bottom right. Teal #2CB1BC accent. Aspect ratio 1:1.
prompts.negative_prompt: confusing messaging, illegible review card, bad layout, watermark, english text

prompts.headline: "¡Por fin un kit que me hace ver profesional!"
prompts.prompt: IMPORTANT: All text visible in the image must be written exclusively in Spanish — no English words in any headline, label, callout, badge, CTA, or caption. Use brand images as reference. Create: a review-focused ad with a solid lilac #A855F7 muted pastel background filling the entire image. Top half: large bold italic serif white text with curly quotes: '"¡Por fin un kit que me hace ver profesional!"'. Directly below the quote: five large gold star icons in a horizontal row. Bottom left, overlaid on the color block: white rounded-corner review card with soft shadow containing: gray circular avatar icon, bold name 'Valentina C. 🇨🇴' with blue verified checkmark 'Compradora Verificada' in blue small text. Review body in dark regular sans-serif (4-5 lines): 'Llevo 3 años como esteticista y siempre usaba guantes azules genéricos. El Kit Lila de PROVI cambió todo. El lila coordina perfectamente con mi consultorio y mis clientas preguntan donde compro. La calidad INVIMA se nota en cada uso. Lo recomiendo completamente...' ending with '...Leer más' in bold lilac. Below text: '¿Fue útil esta reseña? 👍 247 / 1.8K'. Bottom right, overlaid on card edge: Kit Lila Completo product (lilac gloves box slightly tilted) with subtle shadow. Aspect ratio 1:1.
prompts.negative_prompt: fake review UI, cluttered card, bad typography, watermark, english text

prompts.headline: 200 unidades de bioseguridad en 1 solo kit

Center: Kit Lila Completo product (lilac gloves box, lilac masks box, lilac hair nets neatly arranged) on white background, soft studio lighting. prompts.headline: ¿YA LEÍSTE ESTO? 😱
prompts.prompt: IMPORTANT: All text visible in the image must be written exclusively in Spanish — no English words in any headline, label, callout, badge, CTA, or caption. Use brand images as reference. Create: a static ad on clean white background. Top: oversized bold black sans-serif headline '¿YA LEÍSTE ESTO? 😱'. Center: a realistic social media comment card with light gray rounded background containing: small circular profile avatar (top left), bold name 'Monica Velandia', multi-sentence review in regular-weight sans-serif: 'Llevaba años comprando guantes, tapabocas y gorros por separado y gastando muchísimo más. Una amiga me recomendó el Kit Lila de PROVI y no lo puedo creer. Todo coordinado en lila, precio de distribuidor, llega en 2 días y la calidad es INVIMA. Mi consultorio ahora se ve completamente diferente. Ya hice 3 pedidos.' Gray timestamp 'hace 2 días' below comment. Facebook-style reaction icons (👍 ❤️) with count '312'. Bottom center: Kit Lila Completo product photo on white surface, soft studio lighting, slightly angled. No brand logo. No stars. Raw and organic feeling. Aspect ratio 1:1.

prompts.headline: PROVI ESTÁ TRANSFORMANDO EL SECTOR DE INSUMOS DE BELLEZA
prompts.prompt: IMPORTANT: All text visible in the image must be written exclusively in Spanish — no English words in any headline, label, callout, badge, CTA, or caption. Use brand images only for tone reference. Do not use polished ad designs — this must look like organic editorial content. Create: a full-ambient portrait photo of a young professional Colombian woman in a modern beauty salon, wearing lilac PROVI gloves, lilac mask, lilac hair net, working on a client's nails. Warm amber-toned lighting, shot at 50mm f/1.8, shallow depth of field, cinematic color grading with warm highlights and cool shadows. The bottom 45% has a text overlay zone: a prominent white pill-shaped rounded label reading 'INSUMOS DEL MOMENTO' in centered sans-serif uppercase. Below: large condensed bold uppercase sans-serif headline filling the width in white with key phrases highlighted in lilac: 'PROVI ESTÁ TRANSFORMANDO EL SECTOR DE INSUMOS DE BELLEZA — Y LAS PROFESIONALES YA LO SABEN'. Bottom center: '@provi.tienda' in small white text. No product shot, no CTA button, no stars. Must read like a beauty industry blog post, not a paid ad. Aspect ratio 4:5.
prompts.negative_prompt: polished ad design, obvious advertisement, stars, price tags, watermark, english text

prompts.headline: El lila que tus clientes no olvidan.
prompts.prompt: IMPORTANT: All text visible in the image must be written exclusively in Spanish — no English words in any headline, label, callout, badge, CTA, or caption. Use brand images as reference. Create: a static ad on vibrant diagonal gradient background flowing from lilac #A855F7 (top left) to teal #2CB1BC (bottom right). Top left: large white Cooper Black or rounded retro-serif oversized playful text: '¡El lila que tus clientes no olvidan!' — the text feels loose, fun and expressive, not rigid or corporate. Right side: a professional hand descending from the top right corner holding the Kit Lila product box (lilac gloves visible inside), positioned center-right slightly below midline. Bottom left: PROVI logo in white with 'Insumos de Bioseguridad Premium' in smaller white text below. Teal #2CB1BC CTA button: '➜ Pídelo por WhatsApp'. No statistics, no reviews, no badges. The gradient and headline do all the work. Energetic, bold, joyful brand personality. Aspect ratio 1:1.
prompts.negative_prompt: rigid corporate design, dull colors, fake looking, watermark, english text

prompts.headline: pedí por whatsapp / llegó en 2 días / nunca más compro por separado 💜
prompts.prompt: IMPORTANT: All text visible in the image must be written exclusively in Spanish — no English words in any headline, label, callout, badge, CTA, or caption. Use product images as brand reference for colors and packaging only. Create: a lifestyle product photo set in a warm, bright beauty salon workspace — clean white counter, salon tools subtly visible in background (nail files, brushes), warm natural window light from the side, naturally blurred background. The frame is very slightly off-center — the product not perfectly centered, left edge very slightly cropped — feels found rather than composed. Natural subtle sensor grain consistent with an iPhone in indoor daylight. Subtle natural vignette in corners. Center dominant: Kit Lila Completo (lilac nitrile gloves box with PROVI branding, lilac face masks box, lilac hair nets pack) arranged casually on the white counter, slightly tilted toward viewer. A few individual lilac gloves scattered casually around the base for realism. Stuck directly onto the front of the main product box: a yellow square Post-it note, slightly crooked and imperfect — slightly trapezoidal from pressing angle. Realistic paper texture with a horizontal fold in the middle. Subtle curl on bottom right corner only. Held at top by a small piece of transparent tape, slightly wrinkled. Written in thick black marker handwriting, imperfect and uneven, natural lowercase lettering — not formatted, not centered: 'pedí por whatsapp' line break 'llegó en 2 días' line break 'nunca más compro' line break 'por separado 💜'. No attribution. No signature. Bottom center of frame, outside the photo on a plain white strip: small lowercase sans-serif caption text: 'provi.tienda — insumos que transforman tu imagen'. No logo overlay anywhere. Brand identity carried entirely by the product packaging visible in the photo. No border. Mood: auténtico, casual, confiable. Aspect ratio 4:5.
prompts.negative_prompt: polished ad design, centered composition, fake handwriting, bright uniform lighting, studio backdrop, watermark, english text
